title: Rekt Friends Forever
description: A very Vanilla+ experience of Minecraft meant for friends to play together and have a good time. If you are looking for a seamless transition between mods and normal Minecraft that is the goal of this mod pack.
body:
Rekt Friends Forever is a pack that is looking to be a medium level modded experience, combining some fantastic tech and fantasy mods like Create, Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks, and Wandrous. With a spice of Quality of life mods like Xaero's minimap to make a fun experience built for our group of friends, and if you like it, you can share with yours.



### External Mods From Cursforge

Cosmetic Armor Reworked:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
